applied_optimizations.name: Add small-M GEMM configs for decode
applied_optimizations.description: Added M_LEQ_4/8/16/32 entries to FP8 and BF16 GEMM configs with smaller BLOCK_SIZE_M (4-32) and higher NUM_KSPLIT (4-8) for batch=1 decode. Also updated MoE config with smaller BLOCK_SIZE_M (16-32). This enables better GPU utilization for small-M decode workloads by matching block sizes to actual M dimension and enabling K-split parallelism.

hotspot_targets.reason: Largest MoE compute kernel, uses default config with block_m=32, ksplit=0 which is suboptimal for batch=1 decode
hotspot_targets.next_step: OPTIMIZED: Added M_LEQ_4/8/16/32 entries with smaller BLOCK_SIZE_M and NUM_KSPLIT=4-8

hotspot_targets.reason: Largest single kernel, likely attention output projection or dense layer GEMM for batch=1
hotspot_targets.next_step: OPTIMIZED: Added M_LEQ_4/8/16/32 entries with smaller BLOCK_SIZE_M and NUM_KSPLIT=4-8

hotspot_targets.reason: FP8 attention logits computation, 4.6% of decode time
hotspot_targets.next_step: Future: Evaluate if DeepGEMM has decode-specific optimizations

next_moves: Profile with new configs to verify tuned configs are being used (AITER_LOG_TUNED_CONFIG=1)
Consider further tuning of NUM_KSPLIT values for different K dimensions
Explore MoE ksplit optimization for expert parallelism
Investigate DeepGEMM optimization opportunities (currently 4.6% of time)
notes: Baseline: 43.4 ms decode median latency
After GEMM config optimization: 22.4 ms (48% improvement)
Key insight: Default GEMM configs had BLOCK_SIZE_M=128-256 and NUM_KSPLIT=1, optimized for training not decode
Small-M configs (BLOCK_SIZE_M=4-32, NUM_KSPLIT=4-8) dramatically improve decode performance
Active backends: tilelang attention (NSA), aiter fused_moe, AiterCustomAllreduce, aiter FP8 GEMM
Files modified: gfx950-GEMM-A8W8_BLOCKSCALE.json, gfx950-GEMM-A16W16-ATOMIC.json, gfx950-MOE-FP8_W8A8.json

applied_optimizations.name: Enable MoE ksplit for 1-stage mode
applied_optimizations.description: Modified ksplit selection to enable ksplit=4 for MoE FP8 GEMM

applied_optimizations.name: Add M_LEQ_1/2 GEMM configs
applied_optimizations.description: Added M_LEQ_1/2 entries with BLOCK_SIZE_M=4, NUM_KSPLIT=16

applied_optimizations.name: Add shape-specific BF16 GEMM config for MoE router
applied_optimizations.description: Created tuned config for MoE router gate GEMM (N=256, K=6144) with small-M entries (BLOCK_SIZE_M=1-16, NUM_KSPLIT=14-32) optimized for batch=1 decode.

applied_optimizations.name: Fast path for small-M BF16 GEMM
applied_optimizations.description: Added early return using torch.mm for M<=4 to avoid Triton kernel launch overhead for tiny matmuls (router gate in decode).

applied_optimizations.name: Additional BF16 GEMM shape configs
applied_optimizations.description: Created configs for attention linear layers (qkv_proj, o_proj) but no measurable improvement.

applied_optimizations.name: Enable aiter allreduce fusion
applied_optimizations.description: Uncommented enable_aiter_allreduce_fusion = True for DeepseekV3ForCausalLM and Glm4MoeForCausalLM on HIP. This enables fused allreduce+RMSNorm kernel when available.

applied_optimizations.name: Add CUDA_DEVICE_MAX_CONNECTIONS=1
applied_optimizations.description: Set CUDA_DEVICE_MAX_CONNECTIONS=1 to potentially overlap allreduce with compute on AMD GPUs.

applied_optimizations.name: Enable aggressive ksplit for batch=1 MoE
applied_optimizations.description: Modified get_ksplit to return ksplit=8 for token=1 decode, but no measurable improvement observed.

applied_optimizations.name: Router GEMM with torch.matmul and pre-transposed weight
applied_optimizations.description: Changed Glm4MoeGate.forward to use torch.matmul with pre-transposed weight for potential M=1 GEMV optimization. No measurable improvement - same underlying kernel.

applied_optimizations.name: Reduce MoE tiny_M block size
applied_optimizations.description: Reduced BLOCK_SIZE_M from 16 to 8 for tiny_M MoE config, but no measurable improvement.

attempted_but_failed.name: torch.compile
attempted_but_failed.error: Incompatible with MoE model CUDA graphs

attempted_but_failed.name: Flashinfer attention backend
attempted_but_failed.reason: DeepSeek DSA requires tilelang NSA backend

attempted_but_failed.name: AITER_KSPLIT env var
attempted_but_failed.error: ksplit already disabled due to token*topk > expert condition

attempted_but_failed.name: SGLANG_DISABLE_CUDA_GRAPH
attempted_but_failed.error: CUDA graph overhead not the bottleneck

attempted_but_failed.name: FP8 router quantization
attempted_but_failed.reason: Scale format mismatch caused fallback to BF16
attempted_but_failed.error: gemm_a8w8_blockscale requires block-wise scales, not per-token/per-channel

attempted_but_failed.name: FP16 router
attempted_but_failed.reason: No improvement - dtype conversion overhead cancels Tensor Core benefit

attempted_but_failed.name: trial_4
attempted_but_failed.reason: The 16.8ms target (27% improvement from 21.4ms) appears too aggressive given that the agent has exhausted GEMM config tuning, torch.compile failed on ROCm, and memory bandwidth is the fundamental bott

hotspot_targets.next_step: Convert MoE router to FP8 or use CK GEMM tuned instances
Limited headroom - configs already optimized for small-M
